title: klino #2827
definition:
1) transitively
    1a) to incline, bow
    1b) to cause to fall back
    1c) to recline
        1c1) in a place for repose
 2) intransitively
    2a) to incline one's self
        2a1) of the declining of the day
nasbUsage:
